headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades F5 to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $475
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Amit Daryanani   upgrades F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) from In-Line to Outperform and raises the price target from $320 to $475.
